data: The SLA provides 99.9% monthly uptime with service credits for breaches
and P1 incidents have a 1 business hour response time while P2 incidents have a 4 hour response time.

data.answer: The SLA provides 99.9% monthly uptime with service credits for breaches [ID:0]. P1 incidents have a 1 business hour response time and P2 incidents have a 4 hour response time [ID:1].

chunks.title: Service Level Agreement
chunks.content: The standard SLA provides 99.9% monthly uptime with service credits issued for breaches based on monthly spend.

chunks.title: Support Policy
chunks.content: Support hours are 24x5 with a 1 business hour response time for P1 incidents. P2 incidents have a 4 hour response time.
